title: Unlock Premium
descriptionIntro: Understand your child’s emotions more deeply and support them better.
featureCalendarBody: Look back and see when and why emotions happened
featureReportBody: Understand patterns like frequent anger or anxiety
featureSiblingBody: Track and compare each child’s emotions separately
featureMemoBody: Record what caused each emotion and discover patterns over time
priceNote: Pay once and unlock all features forever
